PARTIAL TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 2320-B-PS
ORGANIZATION BOOK OF THE NSDAP (1940)
"The young driver who has received his training in the six-week courses of the NSKK will be well prepared in body and spirit when the time comes for his military service, and will wear with pride the dress of the Armed Forces of the Nation." [Page 394].
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
